concept: Song / The Open Expression of Beauty
description: The marriage of word and melody that carries the soul's deepest truths. It is a communal and personal act of making beauty audible and emotion resonant.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'shialo' (beauty) and 'a' (openness). The word's structure literally means 'open beauty.' This defines a song as the act of opening up and sharing aesthetic harmony. Its long, melodic, four-syllable structure with multiple vowel hiatuses makes it one of the most sonorous words, fitting for the concept.
